content:
# BM25 Hybrid Search — Design Approved (2026-03-27)

## Decision
Approved composable retrieval pipeline with BM25 hybrid search after 3 rounds of 5-persona review (Senior SWE, PM, QA, Performance Engineer, API Design Reviewer). All Critical and Important issues resolved. Final round: 5/5 approve, 0 blocking issues.

## Architecture
4-stage composable pipeline: Searcher → Fusion → Expander → Reranker
- Generic ComponentRegistry<T> with factory pattern for plug-and-play components
- NormalizedScore newtype enforces [0,1] fusion contract at type level
- Per-searcher normalization (each Searcher normalizes own output)
- ArcSwap hot-swap for runtime A/B benchmarking
- Arc<KnowledgeEntry> through pipeline to avoid cloning
- tokio::spawn per searcher for panic isolation + timeout

## BM25 Integration
- LiteStore: tantivy 0.22 (pure Rust, code-aware tokenizer)
- PostgresStore: tsvector + ts_rank_cd (native PostgreSQL FTS)
- FullTextSearchable trait (separate from QueryableStore)
- Batched commits (100 entries or 500ms), write-generation staleness counter

## Ship Gates
- Source Recall@5 > 50% (baseline: 37.5%)
- MRR > 0.60 (baseline: 0.544)
- No category regression
- p95 latency < 20ms

## Implementation Phases
Phase 1: Pipeline abstraction (zero behavioral change)
Phase 2a/2b/2c: Tantivy + PostgresStore + BM25Searcher+RRF (parallel)
Phase 3: Integration + hot-swap
Phase 4: Evaluation + default flip

## Design Doc
repos/corvia/docs/rfcs/2026-03-27-hybrid-search-brainstorm.md
